ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported
e.g., Baseline, 6-Month Follow Up, Year 2; Morning, At Bedtime

ElementDescription: I feel little or no conflict between my racial/ethnic identity and my [piped SO] identity.
Notes: 1 = Disagree strongly; 4 = Neither disagree nor agree; 7 = Agree strongly; 888 = N/A condition skipped; 999 = Missing/no answer

ElementDescription: I have not yet found a way to integrate being [piped SO] with being a member of my racial/ethnic group.
Notes: 1 = Disagree strongly; 4 = Neither disagree nor agree; 7 = Agree strongly; 888 = N/A condition skipped; 999 = Missing/no answer

ElementDescription: It is easy for me to be both [piped SO] and a member of my racial/ethnic group.
Notes: 1 = Disagree strongly; 4 = Neither disagree nor agree; 7 = Agree strongly; 888 = N/A condition skipped; 999 = Missing/no answer

ElementDescription: I separate my [piped SO] and racial/ethnic identities.
Notes: 1 = Disagree strongly; 4 = Neither disagree nor agree; 7 = Agree strongly; 888 = N/A condition skipped; 999 = Missing/no answer

ElementDescription: I often feel like I'm betraying either my racial/ethnic community or the LGBTQ+ community.
Notes: 1 = Disagree strongly; 4 = Neither disagree nor agree; 7 = Agree strongly; 888 = N/A condition skipped; 999 = Missing/no answer

ElementDescription: I feel as if my sense of racial/ethnic identity is at odds with my [piped SO] identity.
Notes: 1 = Disagree strongly; 4 = Neither disagree nor agree; 7 = Agree strongly; 888 = N/A condition skipped; 999 = Missing/no answer
